title: Sun Dried Flies @ Live! On Elgin

artistInfo.name: Sun Dried Flies
artistInfo.desc: Formed in 2021 in Prescott, Ontario, Sun Dried Flies channel the spirit of ’90s alternative rock while fearlessly diving into every genre under the sun—classic rock, grunge, blues, country, funk, pop, and more. They play everything you want… and more.

artistInfo.name: Taxi Girls
artistInfo.desc: HIGH OCTANE - FIERCE - SWEATY - LOUD.

artistInfo.name: Subtrash Music
artistInfo.desc: La Pêche hillbilly punk weirdos.

artistInfo.name: Ciggie and the Darts
artistInfo.desc: Blending classic rock n roll riffs with the frantic speed and energy of punk rock.

artistInfo.name: Passenger Princess
artistInfo.desc: Ottawa's #1 anti-bus punk rock.

artistInfo.name: HotSkins
artistInfo.desc: HotSkins have been crafting a diverse collection of songs since 2018, driven by their love for making music and performing live. Their collaborative approach blends various genres, aiming to create music that resonated and inspires. HotSkins are focused on refining their unique sound and having a blast while doing it, all while hoping to leave a meaningful impact on their listeners.

artistInfo.name: It Shines
artistInfo.desc: It Shines is a folk punk band from Ottawa, Ontario, Canada. Forming in early 2025, It Shines focuses on writing sensitive songs about their feelings, relationships, and experiences. Sound-wise, they mix the energy and thoughtfulness of fourth-wave emo with the sound of indie folk. It Shines has been compared to artists like Bright Eyes, The Cure, and Big Thief. They have been playing shows since late 2025 and are currently in the process of recording and releasing music.

artistInfo.name: Candy Says
artistInfo.desc: We are Candy Says! We are a 3 piece queer punk band from Ottawa, ON. Our influences include Wire, the Damned, Bikini kill and the Cramps. We have been a band for a little over a year and have been playing shows since august!

title: Kibble, August John and Phasez @ Avante Garde
B.A. Johnston, Thunderkok and Sons of Butcher @ Targ

artistInfo.name: B.A. Johnston
artistInfo.desc: Canada’s most prolific entertainer is back to play selections from his 20+ year/13+ album career. Meet you in the bathroom for B.A.'s customary closing number.

artistInfo.name: Sons of Butcher
artistInfo.desc: Sons of Butcher is a Canadian rock band and was once a cartoon series on Teletoon. Their music fuses vulgar absurdist comedy with rock music in a style that is described as 'Tenacious D meets Spinal Tap'.

artistInfo.name: Thunderkok
artistInfo.desc: New Wave of Canadian Heavy Metal. Ottawa's most outrageous noize makers. Beer-fueled, riff-heavy, and built for chaos. With scorching leads, crushing riffs, and wild onstage antics, they turn every gig into a booze-soaked spectacle of pure mayhem. Lord help us all.

title: The Meteors, Gunsmoke and Slo' Tom & The Handsome Devils @ Targ

artistInfo.name: The Meteors
artistInfo.desc: The undisputed kings of psychobilly—loud, fast, and fiercely original. Since exploding out of London in 1980, they’ve carved their own bloody path by fusing raw punk energy with rockabilly swagger and a love for all things macabre. The Meteors continue to dominate the genre they helped create.

artistInfo.name: Gunsmoke
artistInfo.desc: Exhumed for your listening pleasure.

artistInfo.name: Slo' Tom & The Handsome Devils
artistInfo.desc: If you like Hank I, Hank III & Social D you’ll get along famously with 613 legend SLO’ TOM & his band THE HANDSOME DEVILS. Prepare to be thoroughly entertained.

title: MOONBEAN, Hans! and Sugar Bomb! @ Targ

artistInfo.name: MOONBEAN
artistInfo.desc: Ontario-based hardware electronic artist who mixes disco, acid house, and electro with messages of radical self-love and empowerment.

artistInfo.name: Hans!
artistInfo.desc: Hans!' goal is to surprise and inspire, creating an energetic, electric mood, but also sharing stories through thoughtful lyrics and melodies. His dynamic voice and performance style create an atmosphere of welcome celebration. What are we celebrating? The spirit of creativity.

artistInfo.name: Sugar Bomb!
artistInfo.desc: 4 friends from Ottawa–Gatineau cranking out weird, high-energy tunes and loud harmonies.

title: Monach, Neon Ghost House, Passenger Princess and Futura Free @ Targ

artistInfo.name: Monach
artistInfo.desc: Denny's aficionados and friendship enthusiasts.

artistInfo.name: Neon Ghost House
artistInfo.desc: Having shared the stage with other notable acts such as The Dirty Nil, Rarity, Single Mothers and Hotel Mira, it's clear to see that they have no intention of slowing down. Now Neon Ghosthouse tours around their home provinces of Ontario and Quebec as they continue to explore new cities across Canada bringing their rowdy, exciting and unforgettable live shows to everyone who gives them the chance.

artistInfo.name: Passenger Princess
artistInfo.desc: Ottawa's #1 anti-bus punk rock.

artistInfo.name: Futura Free
artistInfo.desc: Psychedelic, shoegazy emo from Ottawa.

title: Pinksnail, Rumination Year, Thee Male Nurse and DJ Hug Mosh @ Targ

artistInfo.name: Rumination Year
artistInfo.desc: Rumination Year is Wizard Matty’s “solo full band”. It’s got THEE Davey and Jordy from crusades/creeps/zebrassieres. Big HUSKER DÜ energy.

artistInfo.name: Thee Male Nurse
artistInfo.desc: Ottawa Valley experimental indie folk.

artistInfo.name: Chaös
artistInfo.desc: Ottawa heavy rock band.

artistInfo.name: Trenchfoot
artistInfo.desc: Trench Foot was born in the deep woods of Ontario and has now relocated to Montreal. The project has quickly risen in the bass music ranks after a switch to dnb from his early dubstep roots. Recently playing all over eastern Canada and with releases spanning multiple genres, he is sure to bring a unique sound.

title: Madeline Goldstein, Frissons and Dark Discothèque DJ's @ Targ

artistInfo.name: Madeline Goldstein
artistInfo.desc: Founded after relocating to LA in 2019, Madeline has now self-released an experimental full-length album ('Forget This,' 2020) and several singles showcasing their ethereal dream-pop presence and ever-evolving home production skills. With emotion and a strong ear for pop melody, Madeline Goldstein echos the energies of new wave, dream-pop, and dark wave, all while showcasing the vocal range and passion of femme pop icons and 80's theatrics. Her lineup featured a rotating cast of textural guitar and the occasional passionate saxophonist.

artistInfo.name: Frissons
artistInfo.desc: A new dark electronic dance music band featuring Annick Giroux and Nathaniel Hébert. The name, inspired by Cronenberg’s film Shivers, reflects their eerie, cinematic sound, which blends darkwave, italo, EBM, and synthpop elements.
